updates.title: Matters tab + reliable updates + full tariffs
updates.notes: New Matters tab: create and manage matters directly, choosing High Court, Magistrate/Regional Court or Miscellaneous (non-court). Each matter gets an automatic firm reference; court matters have a court case-number field to fill in once the court issues it (about 24 hours), plus court name(s) and applicant/respondent names, and these auto-fill the Bill of Costs. Miscellaneous matters have no case number. Every detail is editable at any time. Also: update detection now reads the real installed version (no more getting stuck) and always fetches the latest manifest; existing installs receive the complete High Court (33) and Magistrate (148) gazette tariff lists via a one-time migration that keeps any edited rates; and internal files were repaired so the app starts reliably. Install this once by double-clicking the installer and future updates are detected automatically.

updates.title: Full gazette tariff lists — every item
updates.notes: Completeness update to the fee tariffs. The High Court and Magistrate work-done dropdowns now contain EVERY line item exactly as published in the 2025 gazettes, including the descriptive sub-items that were previously omitted: the Sec 65 / 72 / 74 'additional costs allowed' disbursement and tracing lines, the collection-commission percentages, the reserved gazette slots (High Court D-04, Magistrate IV-25), Part I-05, and the counsel travelling-time line. High Court now has 33 items; Magistrate has 148 (Table A Parts I–IV and Table B Parts I–III). Descriptions were re-transcribed to match the gazette wording. All rates, percentage caps and minimums are editable under Settings → High Court / Magistrate tariffs.

updates.title: Complete court tariffs & Bill of Costs polish
updates.notes: The work-done dropdowns now contain EVERY line item from the 2025 gazettes — no shortcuts. High Court (Notice 52750): full sections A–F including the Bill-of-Costs and taxation percentages. Magistrate/Regional Court (Notice 53149): full Table A Parts I–IV and Table B Parts I–III (Sec 65 / 72 / 74). Percentage items (bill of costs, taxation, collection commission) now calculate from a base amount with the correct minimum and maximum caps, and reference-only items accept a manual amount. Each tariff item — including the percentages — is editable under Settings → High Court / Magistrate tariffs. Bill of Costs now prints the gazette citation line (Notice number and effective date) like a real court document, and the firm logo is larger on all documents. Also includes a stability fix to the document engine.

updates.title: Court matters, tariffs & Bill of Costs
updates.notes: Major update for litigation billing. Create matters as High Court, Magistrate/Regional Court or Miscellaneous — each gets an automatic firm reference and a court case-number field you fill in later. New editable High Court and Magistrate fee-tariff tables (from the 2025 gazettes) under Settings. Fee notes now take hours AND minutes with a work-done dropdown that auto-loads the tariff unit and rate, billed per unit 'or part thereof', plus a per-line date. Generate a full Bill of Costs (High Court / Magistrate format) aggregating every fee note on a matter, or a single invoice per fee note. Document fixes: firm-name/title header overlap resolved, larger logo, aligned columns, and a professional banking-details block. Also fixes update detection so future versions (2.1, 2.10, …) are always found.

updates.title: Smarter first-time setup
updates.notes: Setup now asks whether this is your firm's first installation or a secondary device. First install runs the full flow (database, firm details, administrator account); a secondary device just connects to the existing firm database and goes straight to sign-in. The 'Set up the firm administrator' link no longer appears on the login page once setup is complete. Administrators create staff accounts with a temporary password that each user can change under My account.

updates.title: Modern UI/UX refresh
updates.notes: Complete visual refresh to modern standards — refined design system with softer shadows and larger radii, glass-blur header and mobile tab bar, animated aurora login screen with glass card and shine-hover sign-in button, elevated stat cards and panels with hover lift, polished buttons, inputs, badges, modals and toasts, smoother micro-interactions throughout, custom scrollbars, and reduced-motion accessibility support.

updates.title: Print preview + real email sending
updates.notes: Print now shows a full-screen PDF preview before printing — see exactly what will come out. Email/Send now actually delivers the document: configure your SMTP server once under Settings → Email (SMTP) and LegalBill sends the PDF as an attachment directly from the app. Supports Gmail, Outlook/365, and any custom SMTP server.

updates.title: New login page design
updates.notes: Completely redesigned login screen — dark navy background with animated glow, centered floating card, gold top accent, logo & wordmark header, password show/hide toggle, and smooth card entrance animation.

updates.title: Print fix, Share sheet & Login freeze fix
updates.notes: Print now works without pop-up permissions. Send/Share opens a full share sheet with email (from/to form), WhatsApp, Google Drive, and more options. Login page no longer freezes on slow connections — 20s timeout with live feedback.

updates.title: Premium UI redesign
updates.notes: Completely redesigned interface — richer shadows, gradient header, gold-accented sidebar, polished stat cards, refined buttons and badges, glass modals, and smoother animations throughout.

updates.title: Premium login redesign & bug fixes
updates.notes: New premium login screen, fixed inactive inputs after logout, update banner above sidebar
